hero.title: I build solutions that reduce manual work and organize operations with more speed.
hero.text: Portfolio focused on operational automation, spreadsheet-driven routines, portal integrations, and PHP web pages and systems.
hero.highlight1: Automation with Playwright, Python, and Excel
hero.highlight2: Websites, dashboards, and internal systems in PHP

summary.label: Profile summary
summary.metric2: for websites, internal systems, and web maintenance
projects.label: Projects
projects.title: Cases with practical focus, results, and technical context.
projects.text: A little more about my projects.
project1.title: Whirlpool workflow for lookup, download, and email dispatch
project1.text: Automation to navigate a portal, look up documents by transport number, download files, and prepare email sending with spreadsheet support and business rules.
project1.problem: A repetitive process involving plant switching, manual document searches, and operational communication.
project1.solution: Automated workflow with session reuse, file downloads, and assisted sending based on an email map.
project1.highlight: Reduces manual effort and improves process consistency.
project2.title: SSW pickup registration with automatic code retrieval
project2.text: Routine for reading spreadsheets, filling data into a portal, capturing the generated code, and writing the result back into the operational base.
project2.problem: Manual pickup registration with risk of mistakes and rework.
project2.solution: Row-by-row processing with validations, error handling, and code persistence.
project3.title: Automation for operational and transportation systems
project3.text: Automations for report downloads, SSW occurrence entries, data extraction, and dashboard creation for operational monitoring.
project3.problem: Operational teams often deal with manual reports, occurrence updates, and transport system lookups, which takes time and increases the risk of mistakes.
project3.solution: Development of automated routines to download reports, submit information into SSW, extract data, and organize indicators for analysis.
project3.highlight: Centralizes repetitive tasks, improves operational visibility, and creates a stronger base for faster decisions.

services.title: The kind of work this portfolio communicates clearly.
services.card1.title: Process automation
services.card1.text: Routines for repetitive tasks, internal portals, lookups, downloads, form filling, and information delivery.
services.card2.title: PHP systems and pages
services.card2.text: Development and maintenance of institutional pages, restricted areas, forms, and small web applications.
services.card3.title: Spreadsheet and operations integration
services.card3.text: Excel read/write flows, process organization, validations, and support for administrative and logistics teams.
about.label: About
about.title: Technical profile focused on real utility.
about.text1: I work on solutions that help teams save time, standardize steps, and reduce manual tasks. My focus is on process automation, operational data handling, and PHP web pages and systems that solve everyday needs.
about.text2: This portfolio was designed to be direct: show the problem, the applied solution, the tech stack, and the perceived impact on the process.
contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's turn a manual routine into a simpler process.
